mapper.select:
select id, function_name as functionName, class_name as className, language, code_text as codeText, input_desc as inputDesc, output_desc as outputDesc, remark, tester_case_count as testerCaseCount, public_test_content as publicTestContent, public_test_source as publicTestSource, public_assert_count as publicAssertCount, creator_id as creatorId, creator_role as creatorRole, manager_id as managerId, create_time as createTime from function_info
and function_name like concat('%', #{functionName}, '%')
and class_name like concat('%', #{className}, '%')
and language = #{language}
and ( (creator_role = 'ADMIN' and creator_id = #{currentUserId}) or (creator_role = 'USER' and manager_id = #{currentUserId}) )
and ( creator_role = 'USER' and creator_id = #{currentUserId} )
order by id desc

select id, function_name as functionName, class_name as className, language, code_text as codeText, input_desc as inputDesc, output_desc as outputDesc, remark, tester_case_count as testerCaseCount, public_test_content as publicTestContent, public_test_source as publicTestSource, public_assert_count as publicAssertCount, creator_id as creatorId, creator_role as creatorRole, manager_id as managerId, create_time as createTime from function_info where id = #{id}
mapper.insert: insert into function_info (function_name, class_name, code_text, input_desc, output_desc, remark, tester_case_count, public_test_content, public_test_source, public_assert_count, language, creator_id, creator_role, manager_id) values (#{functionName}, #{className}, #{codeText}, #{inputDesc}, #{outputDesc}, #{remark}, #{testerCaseCount}, #{publicTestContent}, #{publicTestSource}, #{publicAssertCount}, #{language}, #{creatorId}, #{creatorRole}, #{managerId})

insert into function_info (function_name, class_name, code_text, input_desc, output_desc, remark, tester_case_count, public_test_content, public_test_source, public_assert_count, language, creator_id, creator_role, manager_id) values
(#{item.functionName}, #{item.className}, #{item.codeText}, #{item.inputDesc}, #{item.outputDesc}, #{item.remark}, #{item.testerCaseCount}, #{item.publicTestContent}, #{item.publicTestSource}, #{item.publicAssertCount}, #{item.language}, #{item.creatorId}, #{item.creatorRole}, #{item.managerId})
mapper.select: select id from function_info where function_name = #{functionName} and MD5(TRIM(COALESCE(code_text, ''))) = MD5(TRIM(COALESCE(#{codeText}, ''))) limit 1
mapper.update: update function_info set public_test_content = #{publicTestContent}, public_test_source = #{publicTestSource}, public_assert_count = #{publicAssertCount}, tester_case_count = case when ifnull(tester_case_count, 0) = 0 then #{publicAssertCount} else tester_case_count end where id = #{id}

update function_info set function_name = #{functionName}, class_name = #{className}, language = #{language}, code_text = #{codeText}, input_desc = #{inputDesc}, output_desc = #{outputDesc}, remark = #{remark}, tester_case_count = #{testerCaseCount}, public_test_content = #{publicTestContent}, public_test_source = #{publicTestSource}, public_assert_count = #{publicAssertCount} where id = #{id}
